component.name: Wayhelm
component.summary: Configure and manage the wayvnc Wayland VNC server

description.p: Wayhelm is a graphical front-end for wayvnc — the VNC server for wlroots-based Wayland compositors (Hyprland, sway, river, wayfire, labwc). It handles secure initial setup, generates TLS certificates and RSA keys, installs a systemd user service, and provides live monitoring of connected clients via a tray icon.

ul.li: Step-by-step setup wizard for first-time configuration
Three-state authentication mode: encryption required, legacy fallbacks, or disabled
Self-signed TLS certificate generation with fingerprint display
Connection log of when clients connect and disconnect
System tray icon with live state and quick actions
Firewall (ufw / firewalld) detection and one-click port opening
Compatibility flags for legacy VNC clients
